heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 6305 Authorization of appropriations
text: There are authorized to be appropriated to the Fund $5,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2025 through 2029.
notes: Amendments2024— substituted “2025 through 2029” for “2019 through 2023”.Pub. L. 118–1592019— substituted “2019 through 2023” for “2006 through 2010”.Pub. L. 116–92006— substituted “fiscal years 2006 through 2010” for “fiscal years 2001 through 2005”.Pub. L. 109–363
amendments: Amendments2024— substituted “2025 through 2029” for “2019 through 2023”.Pub. L. 118–1592019— substituted “2019 through 2023” for “2006 through 2010”.Pub. L. 116–92006— substituted “fiscal years 2006 through 2010” for “fiscal years 2001 through 2005”.Pub. L. 109–363
